steps.expected: Top-level layout uses flex/grid with two main panels
steps.observed: The <main> uses `flex h-screen flex-col` with a <header> and a body <div> with `flex min-h-0 flex-1`. The body div contains two children: Left Panel (flex-[3], ~60%) for Conversation and Right Panel (flex-[2], ~40%) for Artifact Workspace.

steps.action: Verify left panel contains conversation area
steps.expected: Left panel has chat messages, input, and voice controls
steps.observed: Left panel (flex-[3]) has: Chat header with 'Conversation' label, scrollable messages area rendering MessageBubble components, and an input bar with text input + action buttons (connect/disconnect, save snapshot).

steps.action: Verify right panel contains artifact workspace
steps.expected: Right panel has workspace header and artifact list
steps.observed: Right panel (flex-[2]) has: Workspace header with 'Workspace' label + file count/size stats, session warning banner, activity spinner (conditional), artifact file list with ArtifactRow components, inline preview area, and Download All button.

codeReferences: BrainstormPage.tsx line 283: `<div className="flex min-h-0 flex-1">` — body split container
BrainstormPage.tsx line 285: `<div className="flex min-w-0 flex-[3] flex-col border-r border-white/[0.06]">` — left conversation panel (~60%)
BrainstormPage.tsx line 349: `<div className="flex min-w-0 flex-[2] flex-col bg-[#080c1c]/60">` — right workspace panel (~40%)

steps.expected: A connect/start button with mic icon and state management
steps.observed: Found connect button (lines ~320-329): conditional rendering based on `!isConnected`. When disconnected, renders 'Start Brainstorm' button with GeminiMicOn icon, onClick={handleConnect}, disabled={isStarting}. Shows 'Connecting…' text when isStarting is true. Uses gradient styling with shadow.

steps.expected: A disconnect/stop button visible when connected
steps.observed: Found disconnect button (lines ~330-337): renders when `isConnected` is true. Shows 'End Session' with GeminiMicOff icon, onClick={stop}. Red/rose styled button.

steps.expected: Hook provides isConnected, isStarting, start, stop
steps.observed: useGeminiBrainstorm hook destructured at top: `{ isConnected, isStarting, messages, artifacts, isGenerating, start, stop, sendText, sendSnapshot }`. The hook manages WebSocket connection, audio context, microphone stream, and proper cleanup on stop().

codeReferences: BrainstormPage.tsx: Connect button uses GeminiMicOn icon, disabled={isStarting}, onClick={handleConnect}
BrainstormPage.tsx: Disconnect button uses GeminiMicOff icon, onClick={stop}, shown when isConnected
useGeminiBrainstorm.ts: start() creates WebSocket to /api/v1/live/brainstorm, sets up audio capture; stop() cleans up all resources

assertions.title: No screen sharing or Midscene controls

steps.action: Grep BrainstormPage.tsx for screen sharing terms
steps.expected: No matches for screen share, display picker, region selector, Midscene

steps.action: Grep BrainstormPage.tsx for any screen/midscene/display/capture references
steps.observed: Broader grep for 'screen|midscene|display|region|capture' returned only one match: line 273 `h-screen` which is a CSS class, not a UI control. No screen sharing, Midscene, or display picker components exist.

steps.action: Review imports for screen/Midscene related components
steps.expected: No imports of screen capture or Midscene components
steps.observed: Imports are: React hooks, ReactMarkdown, JSZip, useGeminiBrainstorm, BrainstormArtifact type, Gemini icon components (Chat, MicOn, MicOff, Send, Star), IconBrainstorm, and SharedUI components (StatusChip, MessageBubble). No screen sharing or Midscene imports.

codeReferences: BrainstormPage.tsx imports: only useGeminiBrainstorm hook (not useGeminiLive), no electron/midscene/screen imports
Grep results: zero matches for screen share, display picker, midscene, region selector, desktop capturer

assertions.title: Save snapshot button sends system text to Gemini

steps.action: Find Save Snapshot button in BrainstormPage.tsx
steps.expected: Button with onClick handler that sends system text
steps.observed: Found 'Save Snapshot' button (lines ~340-348) with onClick={sendSnapshot}, disabled={!isConnected}, styled with amber colors and GeminiStar icon.

steps.action: Review sendSnapshot implementation in useGeminiBrainstorm hook
steps.expected: Sends system-level text message via WebSocket
steps.observed: useGeminiBrainstorm.ts sendSnapshot callback: checks WebSocket is open, then sends JSON `{ type: 'text', content: '[SYSTEM: User requested a brainstorm save. Call save_brainstorm_artifact now with all current ideas.]' }`. This matches the validation contract exactly.

codeReferences: BrainstormPage.tsx: `<button ... onClick={sendSnapshot} disabled={!isConnected}>` with GeminiStar icon and 'Save Snapshot' text

useGeminiBrainstorm.ts sendSnapshot: `wsRef.current.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'text', content: '[SYSTEM: User requested a brainstorm save. Call save_brainstorm_artifact now with all current ideas.]' }))`

steps.expected: A visible warning about session-scoped artifacts and downloading before disconnect
steps.observed: Found session warning banner in the right workspace panel (lines ~358-365). It's a <div> with amber styling (border-amber-500/20 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-300), contains a warning triangle SVG icon, and displays the text: 'Artifacts are stored in your session. Download before disconnecting.'

steps.action: Verify banner is always visible (not conditional)
steps.expected: Banner renders unconditionally in the workspace panel
steps.observed: The warning banner div is rendered directly inside the right panel without any conditional wrapper. It is always visible regardless of connection state or artifact count.

codeReferences: BrainstormPage.tsx: `<div className="mx-4 mt-3 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-amber-500/20 bg-amber-500/10 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs text-amber-300">` with warning icon SVG and text 'Artifacts are stored in your session. Download before disconnecting.'

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. BrainstormPage.tsx has a proper 2-column flex layout (60/40 split), connect/disconnect buttons with mic icons and state management, zero screen sharing or Midscene references, a Save Snapshot button that sends the correct system text via WebSocket, and an always-visible session warning banner.
